title: The Davy Back Fight Challenge
description: The Davy Back Fight continues with more tricks, arguments, and pressure on Luffy’s crew.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. The Davy Back Fight continues with more tricks, arguments, and pressure on Luffy’s crew.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What a surprising turn of events!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The strength of team straw hat...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: They threw pickles out of the ring...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Though both balls are still safe,

dialogue.speaker: Tonjit
dialogue.text: ZORO! Sanji! What are you doing, idiots!!!

dialogue.speaker: Tonjit
dialogue.text: The enemy team's ball is alone!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's a surprise attack by big bang!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hishi hishihi hishihi him ski shi!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: He has knifes under his boot!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Hey, Ref! Thought weapons aren't allowed!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What the hell is he doing!?

summary: The Davy Back Fight continues with more tricks, arguments, and pressure on Luffy’s crew.
